summary: Handheld, shaky footage of a daytime targeted enforcement operation in New York City, showing masked POLICE/agents in tactical vests pushing handcuffed detainees into vehicles on a street, with scuffle audio. It is raw, lightly edited enforcement footage with no music or genre styling, so it does not fit youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: POLICE on vests; tweet caption lists rap sheets (robbery, burglary, domestic violence, etc.)
